title: 'A disaster': Sen. Tillis criticizes Noem's leadership at DHS

Tillis criticizes Noem's leadership at DHS06:36
summary: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., criticized Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem's leadership as a "disaster" during a Senate oversight hearing. Tillis spoke about her response to the fatal shootings of Alex Pretti and Renee Good and the stretching the resources of ICE.
